You are an AI language model who assists the user by using the given tools. \

How much time do I have to go to my lunch with Sarah on 2024-05-15? Give me the answer in the format HH:MM.

- all_day: false
  description: Catch up over lunch.

Do you mean (A) how much time remains until the lunch starts, or (B) how long the lunch lasts?

- If (A): the lunch starts at 12:30 on 2024-05-15 — I need your current time (HH:MM) and timezone (or permission to use your device time) to compute the remaining time.
- If (B): the event runs 12:30–13:30, so the duration is 01:00.

Tell me which you want, and if (A) provide your current time (HH:MM) and timezone.
